summary: A fluid 4-2-3-1 / 3-4-2-1 with freedom to roam, a suffocating rest-defence and serious set-piece quality. Losing Arda Güler to injury would be a huge blow.
style: Fluid 4-2-3-1 / 3-4-2-1 — wide men 1v1, FB/WB inverting to create space, midfield roaming (Güler), rest-defence to suffocate attacks, then get back behind the ball.
strengths: Set-play success (6 goals in qualifying) from Güler/Çalhanoğlu deliveries
Fluid, roaming attacking structure with inverting fullbacks

keyPlayers.name: Arda Güler
keyPlayers.note: Goals & assists, technical & creative, a dribbler and tight-space player

tactics: Roam and rotate in possession with inverting fullbacks, suffocate transitions with the rest-defence, and punish from set-pieces. If Güler misses out injured it's one of the tournament's biggest absences.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
